title: net/url References, Escaping, Host Identity, and Conservative Keys
description: Opaque and hierarchical URLs, RawPath, default ports, fragments, Unicode hosts, query encoding, and base resolution are reduced to unsafe string operations. Learners cumulatively produce Go URL identity and scope admission pipeline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use net/url parsing while distinguishing scheme, opaque data, userinfo, host, port, Path, RawPath, RawQuery, and Fragment.
Resolve reference forms against final response and valid document base URLs while retaining raw and resolved provenance.
Compare decoded and escaped paths deliberately and reject ambiguous, invalid, double-encoded, or policy-changing representations.
